interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 1
interviews.description: Controller modeli, mapping anotasyonlari ve endpoint tasarim temelleri

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 2
interviews.description: HTTP method semantikleri, idempotency ve dogru status code secimi

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 3
interviews.description: PathVariable, RequestParam, RequestBody ve request veri binding pratikleri

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 4
interviews.description: ResponseEntity, media type negotiation ve HTTP cevap tasarimi

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 6
interviews.description: Method argument validation, BindingResult ve custom validation davranislari

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 7
interviews.description: @ControllerAdvice, global exception handling ve standart hata cevabi

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 8
interviews.description: Jackson JSON serialization/deserialization ve API payload kontrolu

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 9
interviews.description: DTO tasarimi, entity mapping ve API kontrati evrimi

interviews.title: Spring MVC Interview - 10
interviews.description: MockMvc testleri, CORS, filter/interceptor ve troubleshooting yaklasimlari
